auth.subtitle: Discover music that resonates with your emotions
auth.termsPrefix: By continuing, you agree to our

invite.title: Join with Google and unlock your invite bonus
invite.subtitle: Your invite code is already attached. Finish sign-up with Google and both accounts will receive the referral reward.
invite.signupBonus: {{count}} bonus searches for you and your friend after sign-up.
invite.googleOnly: The sign-up flow continues with Google.
invite.disclaimer: If you already have an account, opening this invite still links the referral when eligible.

anon.loginForNewChat: Sign in to start another chat.
anon.cannotDeleteOnlyChat: Without an account you can only keep one chat.

landing.title: Find the song that means
landing.subtitle: Describe a feeling, a memory, or a thought. Echoes turns it into music.
landing.step1Desc: Type anything — a memory, an emotion, a moment. No keywords needed.
landing.step2Desc: Echoes reads the emotional texture of your words and maps them to music.
landing.step3Desc: Get curated recommendations with deep explanations of why each song fits.
landing.previewPrompt1: Something for wanting to return to a moment before everything changed.
landing.previewPrompt2: A song for a fragile relationship fading quietly.
landing.previewPrompt3: Music for accepting an ending without making it dramatic.
landing.toastRateLimit: Too many requests. Try again shortly.
landing.toastNoSongs: No songs found. Try a few searches first to refine your profile.

profile.title: Settings
profile.libraryHint: Library & playlists: if they fail, disconnect and reconnect to refresh permissions.
profile.appleLinkedNeedsBrowser: This account already has Apple Music linked. Confirm it on this browser to use playback and playlists.
profile.youtubeMusicComingSoonHint: YouTube Music linking is not available yet.
profile.uiLanguageHint: Language for menus and the app
profile.privacyHint: Allow anonymized data to help improve recommendations
profile.favoritesPlaylistTitle: Echoes playlist on Spotify / Apple Music
profile.favoritesPlaylistHint: Keep an “Echoes” playlist in sync with favorites (connect an account; only tracks with IDs on that service).
profile.streamingLoginRequired: Sign in to connect Spotify, Apple Music, and soon YouTube Music.
profile.advancedAiGuestBody: To connect your OpenAI API key, sign in — the full section will appear here below theme.
profile.billingHint: Subscribe or top up when you need more searches.
profile.tutorialHint: Review the quick guide to Echoes.

describe.title: Start from a feeling
describe.body: Open the chat and describe a mood, memory, scene, or image. Echoes turns that emotional context into song recommendations.

results.title: Echoes explains the match
results.body: Results include a match score, emotional tags, and a short reason why the track fits. Use that context to refine the next message.

playback.title: Connect your streaming service
playback.body: Echoes works without it, but it is better with Spotify or Apple Music connected: full playback, playlist actions, and synced favorites become available.

save.title: Take songs outside Echoes
save.body: With streaming connected, you can save songs to your own library and playlists so they are ready to find and play outside the app too.

memory.title: Build your music memory
memory.body: Revisit past chats and listening history, then continue related searches in the same thread. The more context you keep, the easier it is to find songs that feel right.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.subtitle: Songs that stayed with you.
favorites.empty: No favorites yet. Save songs that resonate.

history.title: History
history.chatsHint: Each conversation has its own emotional memory; your global profile improves with use.
history.emptyChats: No chats yet. Open music chat.
history.listensHint: Tracks you started from play (preview or Apple Music in app). Reopen the chat that produced the result.
history.emptyListens: No plays recorded yet. Press play from chat.

notFound.title: Oops! Page not found
notFound.body: The link may be wrong or the page has moved.

insights.title: Product Insights
insights.subtitle: Quality signals from AI music recommendations.

chat.anonQuotaLogin: You’ve used your free try. Sign in to continue.
chat.musicChatSubtitle: A mood, a phrase — songs in reply
chat.emptyBody: Describe a feeling, a memory, or a moment — or attach a photo. Echoes finds songs that resonate.
chat.playbackHintDesktop: Playback started in the bottom player. You can switch chats — the queue stays active.
chat.playbackHintMobile: Use the player below to listen to this turn’s tracks.
chat.luckySidebarBody: This pick isn’t tied to a chat narrative — it’s a surprise selection shaped by your taste. Use the field below to steer the next search, or refine the mood with “Maybe you meant…” when it appears.
chat.creatorSidebarBody: This search starts from trending songs and sounds, then filters them for what can work in TikTok and Instagram Reels. Describe the kind of video, cut, pacing, payoff, or lyrics you have in mind.
chat.threadProfileEmpty: Still empty — send a prompt to start shaping it.
chat.toastRate: Too many requests. Try again shortly.
chat.noResultsNarrative: I couldn’t find catalogue tracks close enough to this search. Try widening the mood, a different era or language, or tap a suggestion below if you see one.
chat.composerPlaceholder: Text or photo — feeling, memory, moment…
chat.creatorComposerPlaceholder: Video idea, hook, transition, payoff, or trend you want to score…
chat.streamingConnectBody: Link Spotify or Apple Music with an active subscription to play full tracks in the app and add them to your playlists.

promptInput.placeholderDefault: Describe a feeling, a memory, or a moment...
promptInput.creatorPlaceholder: Describe the video, reel style, or trend you want to score…
promptInput.imageHint: Photo attached — send to search for songs

dock.listenEmpty: No plays recorded. Start playback from chat.

streaming.spotifyReconnect: Spotify: disconnect and reconnect from Profile to enable library and playlists
streaming.spotifyReconnectShort: Spotify: disconnect and reconnect from Profile

streaming.applePlaylistAddFailed: Apple Music: not added to playlist
streaming.appleAddedAllLibrary: {{count}} tracks added to Apple Music library

player.airPlayHint: For AirPlay with Apple Music, use Control Center or the system volume menu.
player.previewUnavailable: Preview not available for this track
player.appleConnectHint: You’re hearing a 30-second preview. Open Apple Music for the full track.
player.appleFallbackToPreview: Apple Music couldn’t play this track — switching to preview.
player.spotifyFallbackToEmbed: Spotify couldn’t play this track in the internal player — using the embedded fallback.
player.appleSessionRepaired: Apple Music session refreshed. Try Play again; if it still fails, reconnect in Settings.

pricing.hubSubtitle: Choose PRO for unlimited in-app tokens, or buy token packs whenever you need more searches without a subscription.
pricing.hubCardPlanDesc: Monthly or yearly plan with unlimited tokens and full product access.
pricing.hubCardTokensDesc: One-time packs — ideal if you only need extra searches without a subscription.
pricing.hubFootnote: Payments are processed securely by Stripe. Prices include VAT where applicable.
pricing.planPageSubtitle: Free tier to get started; Premium adds more capacity and features.
pricing.tokensPageSubtitle: Tokens are used for AI music searches. Packs credit your account after payment.
pricing.tokensInfoBox: Each search uses tokens from your balance. With PRO, in-app tokens are unlimited; packs are for accounts without a subscription and add to your balance immediately after checkout.
pricing.wantSubscriptionInstead: Prefer a subscription with unlimited tokens?
pricing.alreadyPremiumHint: You are on Premium. Manage payment method or cancel from the billing portal.
pricing.checkoutSuccess: Payment successful — your plan or tokens will update shortly.
pricing.checkoutError: Could not start checkout. Try again.
pricing.portalError: Could not open billing portal. Connect a subscription first.
pricing.bannerEmpty: You have no tokens left. Buy a pack or upgrade to continue searching.
pricing.bannerEmptyFree: You’re out of tokens. Subscribe to PRO for unlimited tokens, or buy a one-time pack.
pricing.bannerEmptyPremium: You have unlimited tokens with PRO.
pricing.bannerEmptyPremiumHint: Your balance is not deducted while PRO is active.
pricing.bannerLow: You have {{count}} tokens left. Top up before they run out.
pricing.bannerLowFree: Only {{count}} tokens left. PRO includes unlimited tokens, or top up anytime.

whatAreTokens.a: Tokens power AI music searches in Echoes. Each search deducts from the balance for accounts without a subscription. With PRO, in-app tokens are unlimited.

premiumVsTokens.a: PRO is best if you use Echoes regularly: it includes unlimited tokens and product benefits. Token packs are one-time top-ups — useful if you occasionally need more searches without subscribing.

afterPurchase.q: When will I see new tokens?
afterPurchase.a: After Stripe confirms payment, your balance is updated automatically. If it does not appear within a few minutes, refresh the app or sign out and back in.

cancelSub.a: Open Manage billing from your profile or the plan page. You keep access until the end of the paid period; token rules follow your plan at that time.

payment.a: Card and billing details are processed by Stripe. Echoes does not store your full card number.

referral.claimSuccess: Referral applied — you and your friend received bonus tokens.
referral.title: Invite a friend
referral.subtitle: Anyone who signs up from your link gets +{{signup}} tokens, and so do you. If they upgrade to PRO, they get unlimited in-app tokens.
